news.t: Materials ETFs jump the most in 2 months
Materials ETFs see biggest gain in five weeks on hopes for economy

holdings.infoBox: IYM is an equity ETF with a total of 42 individual holdings. The top holdings are Linde stock at 19.75%, Newmont at 9.85%, Freeport-McMoRan at 8.45%, Ecolab at 5.85%, and Nucor at 4.89%.

overview.description: The iShares U.S. Basic Materials ETF (IYM) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in materials equity. The fund tracks a broad, market-cap-weighted index of US basic materials companies that includes raw materials such as metals, chemicals and forestry products. IYM was launched on Jun 12, 2000 and is issued by BlackRock.

data.title: Materials ETFs jump the most in 2 months
data.text: Materials-sector exchange-traded funds jumped Monday as investors appeared to bet on sectors that stand to gain more as economic growth throttles higher. The Materials Select Sector SPDR Fund rose 2.5...

data.title: Materials ETFs see biggest gain in five weeks on hopes for economy
data.text: The materials Sector SPDR ETF rose 2% midday Monday, the strongest performer among the 11 funds tracking sectors of the S&P 500 . It was the fund's biggest gain in five weeks.
